examples: In 1914 the country became a British protectorate.
Most of the weapons were confiscated by the British protectorate government of bechuanaland.
In 1891, Oman became a British protectorate, which lasted until 1971.
In 1963, Zanzibar, a British protectorate since 1890, became an independent state within the Commonwealth.
In practice, the protectorate will probably have to continue for quite a bit longer.
